sn4.8:1.1: Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park.
sn4.8:1.2: Then Māra the Evil One approached the Blessed One and recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn4.8:4.1: Then Māra the Evil One … disappeared right there.
